note: Incremental re-review after D-1/R-1 follow-up. Full vibe-code-reviewer pass in prior review (22-19-54Z) remains valid; delta (dead-code deletion + 3 tests) re-checked inline. D-1 and R-1 closed.

findings.message: sqlite insert/get run synchronously in async handlers (only store_stream offloaded). MVP-acceptable (R-2).
findings.remediation: Wrap metadata calls in run_in_threadpool if concurrency grows, or note in README Limitations.

findings.message: Oversized non-file field maps to 413 not 400 (shares 'maximum size' substring). UX nit (R-3).
findings.remediation: Distinguish 'Field exceeded' from 'Part exceeded' if precise status matters; otherwise accept.

findings.message: resolve_type re-checks ext already ensured by check_extension in the upload path; kept for standalone reuse (S-1).
findings.remediation: Leave as-is if resolve_type is independently callable; else drop the duplicate guard.

findings.message: Head-only (8 KiB) content validation; contained by attachment+nosniff (VF-5).
findings.remediation: Accept under the serving contract, or scan the full stream if stronger guarantees needed.

findings.message: Open-ended dep floors; mitigated by committed uv.lock (VF-6).
findings.remediation: Rely on uv.lock; optionally add upper bounds and refresh on a schedule.
